cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner switches, so I need to track each step carefully. Let me start by listing the initial pairings and then go through each switch one by one. First, the starting partners: - Alice with Sam - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Jamie - Dave with Ophelia - Eve with Patrick Now, the first switch is Bob and Dave switching partners. So Bob, who was with Izzi, will now be with Dave's partner, which is Ophelia. And Dave, who was with Ophelia, will now be with Bob's original partner, Izzi. Let me write that down: After first switch (Bob and Dave): - Alice: Sam - Bob: Ophelia - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Izzi
